title: FG_Fz_PressForce Property
description:
This property sets pressing force to Fz direction during the execution of force guide objects.  It is used when Fz_ControlMode is Press+ or Press-.

Values

When ControlMode is Press+:

Minimum value -250

Maximum value 0

Default:  0

When ControlMode is Press-:

Minimum value 0

Maximum value 250

Default:  0

See Also: Fz_PressForce Property

Fz_ControlMode Property
see_also:
Applies To

Press Object, PressMove Object
